# Third-Party Icon Sources

This directory contains curated open-source SVG icons for ResonantOS.

## Lucide

- Source: https://github.com/lucide-icons/lucide
- License: ISC
- Use: generic UI actions, chat controls, panels, terminal, folders, branch/copy/delete/search actions.

## Tabler Icons

- Source: https://github.com/tabler/tabler-icons
- License: MIT
- Use: primary ResonantOS line-icon family for chat controls and common UI actions.

## Heroicons

- Source: https://github.com/tailwindlabs/heroicons
- License: MIT
- Use: high-quality utility/system icons such as command line, CPU, shield, wrench, sparkle, and bolt.

## Simple Icons

- Source: https://github.com/simple-icons/simple-icons
- License: CC0-1.0
- Use: brand icons where a recognizable third-party product mark is needed.

## Rules

- Keep license files in each vendor folder.
- Do not modify vendor SVG geometry unless copied into a separate derived folder with a note.
- Prefer monochrome usage through CSS color where possible.
- Brand icons should only be used when the referenced product/add-on is actually present or configured.
